title: ANY LAB TEST NOW - 211info
text: ANY LAB TEST NOW EUGENE ANY LAB TEST NOW Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides direct access to clinical lab tests, paternity and DNA, alcohol and other toxicology testing services. Test results should be discussed with a physician or healthcare provider. 19289 SW Martinazzi Avenue Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9am-6pm (541) 343-2398 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 343-2398 FAX (541) 344-4597 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service; does not accept medical insurance DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Diabetes Screening General Laboratory Tests Genetic Testing and Screening HIV Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Specialized Medical Tests If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
